data.title: Medellín aims to attract US visitors valuing sustainability and community respect at USTOA Annual Conference in Maryland.
data.description: In Colombia, the city of Medellín is currently participating in the United States Tour Operators Association (USTOA) Annual Conference in Maryland until Friday, December 5, 2025. Medellín aims to draw in tourists who prioritize sustainability and community respect. The conference serves as a platform for Medellín to showcase its efforts in promoting responsible tourism.

data.title: Frame It Easy unveils colorful matboard matching innovation in response to a colorless 2026 design trend.
data.description: Milford, Connecticut, December 5, 2025 – Frame It Easy has introduced a groundbreaking custom-framing innovation in a year dominated by the color white in the design world. The company's latest offering, Smart Frame, is a burst of color unlike anything seen before in the industry. Today, Frame It Easy revealed the new product, setting it apart from traditional framing options.

data.title: Culp, Inc. to webcast Q2 fiscal 2026 conference call on December 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Financial results for Q2 ended November 2, 2025, will be reviewed. Press release to follow on December 10, 2025.
data.description: Culp, Inc. (NYSE: CULP) has revealed plans to host an online, real-time webcast and rebroadcast of its Q2 fiscal 2026 conference call on December 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The conference will delve into the financial and operating performance for the quarter ending November 2, 2025. Results will be disclosed through a press release after the market closes on December 10, 2025. The live webcast...

data.title: US government plans to acquire more stakes in critical minerals companies to challenge China's rare earth dominance.
data.description: A White House official announced plans for the U.S. government to increase its stakes in critical minerals companies to challenge China's dominance in supplying rare earth materials crucial for high-tech products. Government investment in public companies, once rare, is now seen as necessary. USAR stock is showing movement. Critical minerals are vital for items like industrial magnets, batteries, and defense systems including missiles, radar, and jet engines. These minerals are also key for clean energy technologies. Jarrod Agen, executive director of the National Energy Dominance Council, discussed this strategy. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: KALA BIO closes $10M direct offering on Nasdaq, sells 10M shares at $1 each.
data.description: A pharmaceutical company, KALA BIO, Inc. (NASDAQ:KALA), based in Arlington, Massachusetts, revealed the completion of its recent registered direct offering under Nasdaq rules. The offering involved the acquisition of 10,000,000 shares of its common stock (or pre-funded warrants instead) at $1.00 per share (or pre-funded warrant). This move signifies a significant milestone for the company in terms of financial growth and support from investors.

data.title: Elijah Craig Barrel Proof Rye named Whisky Advocate's 2025 "Whisky of the Year". First-ever from family.
data.description: Louisville, Kentucky - On December 5, 2025, Elijah Craig unveiled their inaugural Barrel Proof Rye, seizing the number one spot in Whisky Advocate's esteemed Top 20 Ranking. This triumph marks a significant achievement for the renowned American Whiskey brand.

data.title: Dr. Kian Eftekhari to present 5-minute ptosis technique at ABAM conference in Park City, Utah. Salt Lake City, Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: Dr. Kian Eftekhari, a well-known expert in eyelid surgery, is set to reveal his innovative 5-minute ptosis procedure to plastic surgeons worldwide at the 18th American-Brazilian Aesthetic Meeting in Park City, Utah. The event will take place in Salt Lake City on December 5, 2025. Dr. Eftekhari, a board-certified oculofacial specialist, will showcase his technique which aims to address ptosis quickly and effectively. This presentation is expected to draw a large audience of professionals eager to learn from his expertise.

data.title: OtterBox introduces waterproof phone case for iPhone 17 models, providing advanced protection.
data.description: In Fort Collins, Colorado, on December 5, 2025, OtterBox introduced the highly anticipated Frē Series waterproof phone case for iPhone 17 models. This product, crafted by LifeProof, offers advanced protection for Apple's latest devices. The case is designed to match the active lifestyles of users and boasts next-level safeguards.

data.title: Investor rights firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges Dexcom, Inc. shareholders to discuss their rights - contact immediately. NY, Dec. 5, 2025.  Good opportunity to enforce your rights. Investigating officers and directors’ breach of duty.Character Count: 213
data.description: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is currently investigating potential breaches by specific officers and directors of DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM). Shareholders are advised to promptly reach out to the firm as there may be a time constraint to assert their rights. This probe follows activities reported in New York on Dec. 5, 2025. Please contact Halper Sadeh LLC for further details.

data.title: NanoXplore's new CEO Marinaccio presents at Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Dec 4, 2025, all resolutions approved. CEO shared presentation, available online.
data.description: In Montreal on December 5, 2025, NanoXplore Inc. (TSX: GRA, OTCQX: NNXPF), a leading graphene company, conducted its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on December 4, 2025, with all resolutions approved. The newly appointed CEO, Rocco Marinaccio, presented information about NanoXplore, available on the company's website under Events and Presentations at www.nanoxplore.ca and on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca.
